landing.headline: Run better retros, together.
landing.lead: VoteRun is a real-time retrospective app for agile teams. Create a board, collect feedback across columns, and vote on what matters—all updating live on every participant's screen.
landing.heroNote: Free to use · Self-hostable · No credit card
landing.mockAlt: Preview of a VoteRun retrospective board with three columns of cards and votes

realtime.title: Real-time collaboration
realtime.body: Cards, edits, and votes sync instantly to everyone on the board over WebSockets.

voting.title: Vote on what matters
voting.body: Surface the team's top priorities—participants vote and the important items rise to the top.

share.title: Share with a link
share.body: Create a board, send the link, and teammates join in seconds—no setup required.

selfhost.title: Lightweight & self-hostable
selfhost.body: A single Go binary with an embedded SQLite database. No external services to run.

create.title: Create a board
create.body: Name your retro and organize feedback into columns like What went well and Action items.

share.title: Share the link
share.body: Invite the team with a single link—everyone joins the same live board.

vote.title: Vote in real time
vote.body: Add cards, cast votes, and watch priorities emerge together, instantly.

cta.heading: Ready to run your next retro?
cta.body: Spin up a board in seconds and invite your team.

login.title: Vote Run App
login.subtitleRegister: Create an account to run your retrospectives.
login.subtitleLogin: Sign in to run your retrospectives.

home.heading: Run a better retro.
home.sub: Spin up a board, share the link, and collect feedback in real time. Everyone votes on what matters most.
home.empty: You haven't created any boards yet. Create one above to get started.
